_purpose: Part K acceptance gates, PRE-REGISTERED and committed BEFORE the locked test set was opened. These are not changed after seeing results. Repair parameters are frozen in repair_params.json at this same commit.

primary_gates.G1_brier_not_worse: repaired Phase-3 paired mean Brier vs Phase-2 <= 0 (does not increase Brier)
primary_gates.G2_logloss_not_worse: repaired Phase-3 paired mean log-loss vs Phase-2 <= 0 (does not increase log-loss)
primary_gates.G3_one_primary_CI_favorable: at least one of {Brier, log-loss} paired 95% bootstrap CI lies entirely below 0 (significant improvement) for an ACCEPT-as-improvement verdict
primary_gates.G4_no_significant_regression: neither primary metric's paired 95% CI lies entirely above 0 (no significant regression)

verdict_rule.phase3b_improves: G3 holds AND G4 holds AND G5 holds
verdict_rule.inconclusive: G4 holds (no significant regression) but G3 does not (no significant improvement)
verdict_rule.phase3b_harms: a primary paired 95% CI lies entirely ABOVE 0 (significant regression)

secondary_diagnostics_reported_not_gated: current Phase-3 vs Phase-2 on the locked set (does the committed regression reproduce out-of-sample?)
prior_only baseline (is evidence assimilation beating the naive prior at all?)
power_caveat: locked test ~34 questions (< the 75 target). A null result is 'not demonstrated', not 'disproven'. No production-readiness claim is made if underpowered.
production_default_rule: If phase3b does not clear G1-G5 as 'improves', Phase-2 REMAINS the production default; repaired Phase-3 is not production-eligible.
frozen_repair_summary: gamma=0.7 likelihood shrinkage, no_info_mix=0, post_temp=1, reference-priors OFF (not selected by validation), convex blend w_phase2=0.5, gate min_effective_obs=4 (Phase-2 fallback below 4 NON-NEUTRAL effective observations, consistent measure in fit and serving). Fit on 23-question DEV capture (event-family train/val split), pre-registered robustness constraints gamma<=0.7 and w_phase2>=0.5.
